title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Retry
scenario: Fit Test fails to retry properly from screen 2 after Cancel or failure on Voyager Free 60+
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on Fit Test
On the first Fit Test screen, tap Start to begin the test
On the second Fit Test screen, tap Cancel (or allow the test to fail)
After returning to the Fit Test start screen, tap Retry
Observe the result displayed after the retry
expected: The fit test runs again from the beginning and the result (Pass or Fail) is displayed correctly after the retry.
